name: @storypointer/desktop
description: Electron desktop shell and packaging project for Story Pointer.

scripts.build:mac: npm run prepare-app && cd .. && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
scripts.build:win: npm run prepare-app && cd .. && electron-builder --win nsis portable
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n vite,electron -c cyan,magenta "npm --workspace @storypointer/web run dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron electron/main.cjs"
scripts.prepare-app: npm run icon && npm --workspace @storypointer/web run build && npm run backend:bundle
